What's up, Jim Launchers? Today, we're going to go over the first few steps of how to get set up. And the first thing we're going to need to do is sign up for a ClickFunnels account. So directly below this video, there should be a button that says ClickFunnels Sign Up. I'm going to go ahead and show you screen by screen what it looks like to sign up, but I won't be actually clicking the buttons today because we already have a sign up. So we already have a login. So once you click on this button, it is going to pop up a screen that looks like this. You're going to click on the Start Free 14 Day Trial button. And from there, you're going to choose your membership. So it'll pull something up that looks like this. And you'll be able to choose whether you want to pay monthly or annually. And then you can choose from two different memberships. Either of them will work for what we want to do for Jim Launch. So once you choose your membership, so you can have either this membership here or one with all the bells and whistles, it will bring you to a screen that asks for all of your information. So you'll fill out your name here, the email you want associated with your account on the second part, and then a password. When you do your password, please be sure to write it down or use something like Last Pass to help you remember. Once you've done that, the next thing it'll do is ask for your billing information. So after you've entered that in, you can choose to add the nine secret funnels training if you would like to, but you're not required to. We do have some funnels that we will be sharing with you so that you can edit them. So after that, you'll just click this button right here, start my free 14 day trial now, and you'll be good to go. I'll see you in the next video.
